name: PAY_STATISTIC_CONTEXTS_VL
query: SELECT b.STATISTIC_CONTEXT_ID, b.BASE_STATISTIC_CONTEXT_ID, b.DISPLAY_FLAG, b.STATISTIC_CONTEXT_NAME, b.LEGISLATION_CODE, b.ENTERPRISE_ID, b.MODULE_ID, b.CREATED_BY, b.CREATION_DATE, b.LAST_UPDATED_BY, b.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, b.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, tl.NAME, b.SGUID SGUID FROM PAY_STATISTIC_CONTEXTS b, PAY_STATISTIC_CONTEXTS_TL tl WHERE b.STATISTIC_CONTEXT_ID = tl.STATISTIC_CONTEXT_ID AND USERENV('LANG') = tl.LANGUAGE
